name: White Desert
desc: Cosmic solitude, white chalk moonscape, silent vastness, otherworldly beauty.

name: Siwa Oasis
desc: Hidden palm groves, ancient salt pools, mystic oracle of Amun, deep isolation.

name: Dahab Blue Hole
desc: Deep blue abyss, adrenaline, bohemian sea vibes, freedom.

name: Aswan Old Cataract
desc: Colonial grandeur, Nile sunset views, Agatha Christie mystery, royal elegance.

name: Valley of the Kings
desc: Underground silence, eternal tombs, golden afterlife, heavy historical weight.
